titleZh: 上市公司信息披露管理办法（2021年修订）
titleEn: Measures for the Administration of Information Disclosure by Listed Companies
issuingBodyZh: 中国证券监督管理委员会
summaryZh: 上市公司持续信息披露的基础规章，细化定期报告、临时报告、公平披露、自愿披露和内幕信息管理等核心义务。
summaryEn: The foundational CSRC rule for continuous disclosure by listed companies, covering periodic reports, ad hoc reports, fair disclosure, voluntary disclosure, and insider-information controls.

sources.label: Official English (reference)
sources.noteZh: 证监会英文站保留的是早期官方英文文本，可作为 2021 年修订版的官方英文参考。
sources.noteEn: The CSRC English site preserves an earlier official English version, used here as an official English reference for the 2021 revised text.
